tool_args.label: Fordham Road – Inwood Bus Priority - Community Board 7 Transportation Committee – June 1, 2023

payload.title: Fordham Road – Inwood Bus Priority
payload.description: Presentation to Bronx Community Board 7 Transportation Committee on Fordham Road bus priority alternatives, including offset bus lanes, eastbound busway, and two-way busway proposals.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Metropolitan Transportation Authority, co-presenter of Fordham Road bus priority proposal

payload.entity_name: New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)
payload.description: Co-presenter of Fordham Road bus priority proposal
MTA program co-presenting Fordham Road bus priority proposal
Bronx Community Board 7 Transportation Committee, audience for the June 1, 2023 presentation
Proposed bus priority treatments along Fordham Road including offset bus lanes, eastbound busway, and two-way busway alternatives. Presented to Bronx Community Board 7 in June 2023.
First SBS route launched in 2008. Busiest bus route in the Bronx, second busiest in NYC after the M15.
Critical crosstown transportation corridor serving as a major Bronx-Manhattan connection. Vision Zero Priority Corridor.

tool_args.label: Alternative A: Offset Bus Lanes in Both Directions

payload.description: Convert existing curbside bus lanes to offset lanes and extend offset lanes. In effect at all times (24/7). Bus-only lane located one-lane away from curb. Single travel lane in both directions. Vehicles allowed to use offset bus lanes for right turns.

tool_args.label: Alternative B: Eastbound Busway from Morris Ave to Webster Ave

payload.description: Eastbound through traffic restrictions on Fordham Rd, except for buses and trucks, with local access on all blocks. Offset lane in westbound direction. Offset bus lanes as proposed in Alternative A outside the Busway section. In effect at all times (24/7).
payload.location_text: Fordham Road, Morris Ave to Webster Ave

normalized_location.raw_text: Fordham Road, Morris Ave to Webster Ave

tool_args.label: Alternative C: Two-Way Busway between Jerome & Webster Aves

payload.description: Both eastbound and westbound through traffic restrictions on Fordham Rd, except for buses and trucks, with local access on all blocks. Includes offset bus lanes proposed in Alternative A outside the Busway section. In effect at all times (24/7).
payload.location_text: Fordham Road, Jerome Ave to Webster Ave

normalized_location.raw_text: Fordham Road, Jerome Ave to Webster Ave

payload.description: Presentation of Fordham Road – Inwood Bus Priority to Bronx Community Board 7 Transportation Committee

tool_args.label: 62% of households on Bx12 corridor have no vehicle access

payload.claim_text: 62% of households on Bx12 corridor have no access to a private vehicle. 71% commute to work via public transit, walking, or biking
payload.subject: Bx12 corridor households

tool_args.label: 83 persons killed or significantly injured on Fordham Rd 2014-2018

payload.claim_text: 83 persons killed or significantly injured between 2014-2018 between Deegan and Boston Road
payload.subject: Fordham Road safety

payload.claim_text: ABLE cameras do change driver behavior: 86% commit only one violation, 9% commit only two violations, 5% commit three or more
payload.subject: ABLE enforcement on Fordham Road

tool_args.label: Alternative A selected as best treatment

payload.claim_text: Based on factors identified in the traffic analyses and listening to the community concerns, Alternative A – offset bus lanes along Fordham Rd – is the best treatment to improve overall bus speeds, reliability, and curb demand while minimizing the effects on buses on north/south corridors
payload.subject: Alternative A: Offset Bus Lanes

payload.claim_text: New design addresses intense curb demand: approximately combined 150+ parking/loading spaces added to corridor instead of confined to two-hour window
payload.subject: Alternative A offset bus lanes design
